settings.heading: Premium wellness essentials for modern routines.
settings.copy: Launch with a category-defining look that feels editorial, commerce-ready, and built to convert from day one.

settings.title: Premium Positioning
settings.text: Clean hierarchy, rich contrast, and confident messaging built to feel established.

settings.title: Conversion Focused
settings.text: Commerce sections prioritize trust, benefits, and quick paths into product discovery.

settings.title: Brand Ready
settings.text: Flexible content fields let you adapt this foundation for wellness, coffee, skincare, or lifestyle.

settings.headline: Designed to feel like a premium product ecosystem, not a template.

settings.title: Best sellers
settings.copy: Merchandise your top products here once inventory is loaded into the store.

settings.headline: Built for brands that want trust, clarity, and premium energy at first glance.
settings.copy: This section gives you room to explain your sourcing, product philosophy, or founder story while still keeping a commercial pulse.
settings.card_text: The layout mixes editorial breathing room with practical conversion cues so the storefront feels upscale without becoming difficult to shop.

settings.quote: The store instantly feels premium and clear. It presents products with confidence.
settings.author: Creative Review Lens

settings.quote: Strong hierarchy, better merchandising, and a more established visual voice than most test stores.
settings.author: Hiring Benchmark

settings.quote: A solid ready-to-customize foundation for launching a high-consideration DTC brand.
settings.author: eCommerce Perspective

settings.heading: To finish the store, plug in products, imagery, policies, and collections.
settings.text: The theme is structured to make those last-mile updates quick while keeping the overall art direction intact.
